update() - Method in class astroidsGame.Projectile
 
update() - Method in class astroidsGame.SpaceShip
 
update() - Method in class graphics.GraphicElement
Method in which the internal parameters of the GraphicElement (i.e. position or any other parameters that are introduced by derived classes to define a shape) can be updated.
update(Graphics) - Method in class display.PixelMatrixPanel
 
update(List<Snake>) - Method in class snakeGame.Snake
makes the snake move by 1 square
